name: ambient-hyperframes
description: Ambient adapter for deterministic HTML/CSS/JS authored-motion video with HyperFrames.

hyperframes_doctor.description: Check Node, npx, FFmpeg, FFprobe, browser runtime, and HyperFrames CLI readiness without installing host dependencies.

hyperframes_setup_plan.description: Return approval-gated setup actions for missing HyperFrames dependencies without running installers.

hyperframes_init.description: Scaffold a non-interactive HyperFrames composition project in the workspace.

hyperframes_inspect.description: Inspect a HyperFrames composition source and return structural metadata without rendering.

hyperframes_render.description: Lint, inspect, render, verify, and report HyperFrames video artifact metadata.
